claim: ILO and UNICEF estimate 160 million children in child labor globally, 70 percent in agriculture, highest absolute numbers in Sub-Saharan Africa, with prevalence concentrated in low-income agricultural households.

source.title: Child Labour: Global estimates 2020, trends and the road forward

method: Reviewed ILO-UNICEF joint estimates, sectoral breakdown, and methodology.
limitations: Estimates are modeled from surveys of variable recency and comparability.
Sub-national breakdowns are not available from global estimates.
